# ai-generated-voice-detection

--This project detects whether a given audio voice sample is a real human voice or generated by AI models (deepfake/voice-cloned). The system analyses voice characteristics and classifies audio as genuine or synthetic.supports 5 languages audios (Hindi, Malayalam, Telugu, Tamil , English).


## key Features
1)Detects AI-generated voice vs real human voice

2)Supports common audio formats (WAV/MP3)

3)Preprocesses audio for feature extraction

4)Extracts audio features (e.g., MFCCs)

5)Uses Machine Learning / Deep Learning models for classification

6)Provides accuracy/performance results

7)Easy to test with sample audio files(5 sec audio only)

## Used Technologies
1)Python

2)Librosa (for audio processing)

3)NumPy, Pandas

4)scikit-learn / TensorFlow / PyTorch


## How does It Works
1)Load input audio file(5 sec audio only)

2)Convert/stereo → mono & normalize audio.

3)Extract audio features (MFCC, spectrogram).

4)Feed features into ML/DL classifier.

5)Output classification: Real or AI-generated.


## Installation and requirements 
1)Clone the repo
   git clone https://github.com/KaranSanpal/ai-generated-voice-detection.git

2)Install dependencies
   pip install -r requirements.txt

3)Run the main script
   python detect.py

## Usage
1)Place your audio files in a specified folder.

3)Run detection script with audio file command.

4)Check results (Real/AI) and confidence score.
